name: Golden Eagle
ecosystem: Open country. Montane grasslands, sagebrush steppe, alpine meadows, cliff faces.
season: Resident (year-round most of PNW range, some altitudinal movement)
conservation: Least Concern (IUCN). Global population ~300,000+. Protected by Bald and Golden Eagle Protection Act.

vocalization.description: Thin, high-pitched yelp or whistle: kyee or kyip. Quiet relative to bird's size.
vocalization.function: Pair bonding (soft), nest defense (louder), food begging by young, alarm
vocalization.notable: Species communicates more through flight behavior (sky dance display) than voice. Voice is secondary to visual/aerial signals.

connections.description: Candlebox (E=6). Both impressive, both slightly removed from their world's mainstream center. 4M debut vs. world's most widespread eagle. Both underestimated.
Bald Eagle territorial (Haliaeetus). Golden Eagle (Aquila) is different genus. Quieter, rarer in PNW, more powerful globally.
Osprey (FIRST PANDIONIDAE). After 3 Accipitridae, new family. Open country Golden Eagle to water-surface Osprey.
